entry.title: New: BILL059(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO SEWER SERVICE CHARGES.

Repeals the requirement that industrial users who discharge or cause to be discharged certain wastewaters into the public sewers pay a surcharge in accordance with ROH Section 43-6.6 ("Nonresidential strength surcharges"), consistent with the repeal of that section by Ordinance 25-27 (Bill 60 (2024), CD2, approved on June 24, 2025).

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
